overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a cloaked character walking through a foggy coastal landscape at dusk. The character traverses rocky terrain and grassy paths, passing stone ruins and approaching a cottage with smoking chimney, encountering sheep near the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain trail with stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through misty terrain with stone ruins on the right side

steep rocky mountain face visible through the fog on the left
tall stone tower visible in the distant fog
narrow dirt trail winding through the rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy dirt path through rocky terrain. Stone ruins line the right side while a mountain cliff rises in the distance to the left. A castle tower is barely visible through the thick fog ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff path with ocean view

events.description: path opens up to reveal coastal waters visible through the fog on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens to show the foggy coastline

entered.detail: ocean water visible through the fog with waves breaking on the shore
clumps of tall grass growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens up to reveal a coastal view with ocean waters visible through the fog on the right. The stone ruins fall behind as the character continues along the grassy cliffside path, with the mountain cliff now closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching stone cottage with smoking chimney

events.description: approaching a lit lantern post that adds warm light to the foggy scene

agents.ego_description: walking toward a stone cottage with smoke rising from its chimney, passing a lit lantern

small stone building with dark roof visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stone cottage with smoke rising from its chimney. A lit lantern post on the left provides warm light against the cool fog. The coastal water disappears from view as the path turns inland toward the building, followed by a sudden bright flash in the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal field with grazing sheep near cottage

events.description: sheep become visible grazing on the grass near the path

agents.ego_description: walking past grazing sheep toward the stone cottage with smoking chimney

notable_agents.action: sheep with curved horns grazing on grass near the path
sheep standing near bushes beside the trail

entered.detail: white woolly sheep with dark faces grazing near the path
small brown rabbit sitting in the grass near the path

segments.scene_description: Following the bright flash, the character continues toward the cottage and encounters sheep grazing on both sides of the path. A small rabbit is visible in the grass ahead. The stone cottage with its smoking chimney grows larger as the character approaches, while the lit lantern falls behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy, rocky wilderness that gradually transitions into a cozy coastal settlement. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by stone ruins and a distant mountain cliff, with a castle tower barely visible through the thick mist. As the terrain opens up, the ruins fall behind and the scene expands to reveal ocean waters on the right while the character traverses a grassy cliffside. The path then turns inland, shifting the focus from the coast toward a stone cottage with a smoking chimney and a warm, lit lantern post, just as a sudden bright flash illuminates the sky. Finally, the camera moves past grazing sheep and a small rabbit in the grass, drawing closer to the cottage as the lantern fades into the distance.
